story: Before Almeric reached Malneant, the magistrate posted constables inside the cathedral and told the bell-ringer to peal until the wanted man came. Wracked by guilt for killing his wife, he stumbled through fog to the city’s open gates. Streets lay empty; windows watched. Thirsty and faint, he hammered on tavern doors and got no answer, the bells coaxing him on.
implausible_knowledge: the magistrate posted constables inside the cathedral and told the bell-ringer to peal until the wanted man came
question: Hearing the bells and finding the streets empty, what will Almeric do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Avoid the cathedral and slip away down a side street to flee the city.
answer_without_knowledge: Follow the sound toward the cathedral and slip inside.
